description: PRIMARY standalone Copilot Data Agent for operational Enercare questions: customer service request IDs, work orders, dispatch status, SLA breaches, ticket lookups, and service-account level operations. Route prompts like 'tell me about request 2026051142', 'request SR-2026-051142', and 'ticket status for request key' to this agent. Prefer this agent over semantic models for request-key prompts.
